rationale: Keep: the cited 2004 paper is a close methodological precursor on whether segmentation structure is recoverable from store-level aggregate data, including identification conditions and finite-sample recovery limits, which directly overlaps the citing paper’s core problem of inferring unobserved assortment/stocking structure from aggregate availability data.
